login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your LeapOne account

branding.headline1: AI search is the new Google.
branding.description: LeapOne audits your business across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI — then generates everything you need to show up.
branding.feature1: AI Presence Audit across 3 search engines
branding.feature2: AI Visibility Score with competitor comparison
branding.footer: © 2026 LeapOne · leapone.ca · Made for Canadian businesses

signup.trialBadge: 14-day free trial · No credit card needed
signup.subtitle: Get started in under 5 minutes
signup.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. LeapOne complies with PIPEDA.
signup.brandDescription: Join Canadian small businesses saving hours every week. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.
signup.errorTerms: You must accept the terms and privacy policy.
signup.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup.errorPasswordWeak: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter and one number.
signup.errorEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.

verifyEmail.heading: Check your email
verifyEmail.body: We sent a confirmation link to your inbox. Click it to activate your account.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentBody: We sent a password reset link to your inbox. It expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.heading: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.errorLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.errorWeak: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter and one number.

insights.label: BUSINESS INSIGHTS
insights.emptyBody: Insights will appear here once your reviews are synced from Google.
insights.emptyStrengths: Strengths will appear once reviews are synced.
insights.emptyWeaknesses: Improvements will appear once reviews are synced.
insights.emptySummary: AI summary will appear once reviews are synced.

detail.aiDraftPlaceholder: AI draft will appear here once Google Reviews is connected.
detail.regeneratePlaceholder: e.g. Make it shorter, be more apologetic

settings.title: Settings
settings.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell the AI about your business — specialties, values, what makes you unique...
settings.autoDraftHint: The AI prepares a draft response as soon as a review arrives, ready for your approval.
settings.ctaCustomPlaceholder: e.g. Mention our loyalty program, or invite customers to book online at leapone.ca
settings.ctaCustomHint: Optional guidance the AI uses when writing responses — it will weave it in naturally.
settings.ctaEnabledLabel: Include a closing invitation at the end of responses
settings.ctaEnabledHint: Adds an encouraging final sentence inviting the customer to return or share their experience.
settings.delayLabel: Acknowledge when responding to old reviews (3+ days)
settings.delayHint: If a review is more than 3 days old, the AI will open with a brief apology for the delayed response.

businessProfile.title: Business Profile
businessProfile.subtitle: Used for your AEO audit — update here whenever anything changes.
businessProfile.provinceHint: e.g. ON, QC, BC (leave blank if not applicable)
businessProfile.servicesHint: Comma-separated list of your main services — used in content generation.

plan.title: Plan & Billing
plan.subtitle: Your current plan and available upgrades.
plan.billingNote: All prices in CAD · Cancel anytime · Stripe billing coming soon

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: Everything you need to dominate local AI search.
features: AI content generator (GBP description, FAQ, schema)

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: More data, more frequency, more action.
features: Action tracking (mark a recommendation done → re-checks that pillar)

business.name: Agency
business.tagline: Manage multiple clients under one roof.
features: Agency dashboard (all clients in one view)

chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything or type a command…

greeting.attention: Here's what needs your attention today:

reviewsCard.label: Google Reviews
reviewsCard.title: reviews need responses
reviewsCard.preview: Latest 2 hours ago — "Great service but the parking was a bit tight…"

chat.followUp: What would you like to do? I can draft review responses, check your schedule, or answer any questions.

aeoCard.label: AI Visibility Audit
aeoCard.title: Find out if AI search engines can find your business
aeoCard.description: LeapOne will audit your presence on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overview — then generate everything you need to improve your score.

step1.heading: Tell us about your business
step1.subtitle: This helps us audit your AI search visibility accurately
step1.servicesPlaceholder: e.g. haircuts, balayage, bridal hair, keratin treatment
step1.servicesHint: Optional — helps us give you more accurate audit results
step1.websiteHint: Optional — used to check if AI search engines are citing your site

step2.heading: Connect Google Business Profile
step2.subtitle: To respond to reviews, we need access to your Google Business account

step4.heading: You're all set
step4.body: Your dashboard is ready. Start managing your reviews with AI.
